## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor / style / chore
- [ ] security

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is short-lived off latest `main`
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits + `Standards: digital-solutions` trailer
- [ ] `node --check` passes for changed JS; JSON is valid
- [ ] Verified the change in the browser (`npx serve .`)
- [ ] Updated docs / README(s) where relevant
- [ ] No secrets or API keys committed
